mapper.select: SELECT * FROM question ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE question_type = #{questionType} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE difficulty = #{difficulty} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM question WHERE create_by = #{createBy} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE subject_id = #{subjectId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question WHERE question_type = #{questionType}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question (subject_id, question_type, question_content, options, correct_answer, score, difficulty, knowledge_point, create_by) VALUES (#{subjectId}, #{questionType}, #{questionContent}, #{options}, #{correctAnswer}, #{score}, #{difficulty}, #{knowledgePoint}, #{createBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE question SET subject_id = #{subjectId}, question_type = #{questionType}, question_content = #{questionContent}, options = #{options}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, score = #{score}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, knowledge_point = #{knowledgePoint} WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
